div.class: d-flex flex-column border rounded-2 tmp-mb-3 pl-1

a.class: prc-Button-ButtonBase-9n-Xk d-none d-lg-flex LinkButton-module__linkButton__nFnov flex-items-center fgColor-default

a.aria-label: View commit history for this file.

footer.class: footer tmp-pt-7 tmp-pb-6 f6 color-fg-muted color-border-subtle p-responsive

div.class: d-flex flex-justify-center flex-items-center flex-column-reverse flex-lg-row flex-wrap flex-lg-nowrap

ul.class: list-style-none d-flex flex-justify-center flex-wrap mb-2 mb-lg-0

button.class: Link--secondary underline-on-hover border-0 p-0 color-bg-transparent text-left

cookie-consent-link.button: Do not share my personal information

div.div: You can’t perform that action at this time.

details.class: details-reset details-overlay details-overlay-dark lh-default color-fg-default hx_rsm

details-dialog.class: Box Box--overlay d-flex flex-column anim-fade-in fast hx_rsm-dialog hx_rsm-modal

button.class: Box-btn-octicon m-0 btn-octicon position-absolute right-0 top-0

svg.class: octicon octicon-check js-clipboard-check-icon color-fg-success d-none m-2 tmp-m-2

clipboard-copy.class: ClipboardButton btn btn-invisible js-clipboard-copy m-2 p-0 d-flex flex-justify-center flex-items-center
